name: stratagraph-skills
description: Project-agnostic skills for feeding a Stratagraph knowledge graph

plugins.name: stratagraph
plugins.description: Skills for feeding a Stratagraph knowledge project over MCP: strata-genesis (interactive cold-start) + daily-strata-gather (daily cloud routine). Requires your Strata project's MCP server connected, e.g. https://stratagraph.io/api/mcp/YOURPROJECT
